/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libtransport_robots__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libtransport_robots__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/transport_robots__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/transport_robots/srv/set_goal__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transport_robots__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/transport_robots/srv/get_position__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/build/transport_robots:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libtransport_robots__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
